title: Better Optimizations
body:
A Minecraft modpack focusing on performance and some graphics improvments. It also keeps the feel of vanilla minecraft.

**Performance**

Thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Noisium and more. The mods have been carefully selected to provide noticeable speed benefits on any device.

**Built on Fabric**

Fabulously Optimized uses Fabric, which is lightweight, fast and supports a lot of mods. You can use the modpack as a base to add your favorite mods to.

If you enjoyed the modpack, you should check out my other cool projects.

- [https://modrinth.com/modpack/nts-minecraft-pro](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nts-minecraft-pro)
- [https://modrinth.com/project/realisticworld](https://modrinth.com/project/realisticworld)
